title: Foco primeiro
prompt: Create a premium abstract visual background layer for a mobile App Store screenshot about intentional focus and digital wellbeing. Portrait composition, soft daylight, clean modern premium feel, subtle glass surface, calm energy, blue green graphite accents, refined depth, no text, no logos, no app UI, no numbers, no charts, no watermarks. Leave generous negative space in the upper third and center for deterministic app copy and phone mockup overlays.
